heading: Safety Beach vs Sailors Gully — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Safety Beach, Victoria and Sailors Gully, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Safety Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Sailors Gully (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Safety Beach or Sailors Gully safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Safety Beach has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Sailors Gully scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Safety Beach scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Sailors Gully scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Safety Beach or Sailors Gully?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Safety Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
